title: misch origins, Musketeer
description: Become a Musketeer, All for one and one for all!
body:
heavily inspired by... a musket.

![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c35c44ab4b3a66eaa48e5752a7e2744d5663f5a_0.webp)

# about the pack
, choose to spawn as a Musketeer

, make use of powerful firepower brought upon by the Musket, and unlock some neat upgrades along the way...

_, dont forget to download the resourcepack_

![Musketeer Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52e07771120bde8d1cb7e34d897e83336defad07_0.webp)

![Origin GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/638085213d3f18a0d6d8d4ec262ccdb1d9064827.png)

![Spoilers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b217ee510e603e773c4779707894636d86bde98.png)

 # spoiler content


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 , here are the recipes available for Musketeer

 ### Stilted Musket
 , the only craftable rifle, able to be applied with different upgrades

 ![Stilted Musket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c016b9780c5de7c070073b42f01b53bf6a8953b7.png)

 ### Bayonet
 , right-clicked onto muskets to increase its melee damage

 ![Bayonet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa8528b4c058c61e4540c92b1202fb27a96b1a71.png)

 ### Steel Polish
 , right-clicked onto muskets to increase its base damage by 1

 ![Steel Polish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1db094a73567c5125c76d3e1f7eff4cf842526f.png)

 ### Gunpowder Pouch
 , an alternative for gunpowder when priming muskets, has 238 durability

 ![Gunpowder Pouch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4455c7946ba38887cdaf606eb04d32cc63cdf140.png)

 ### Blazing Pouch
 , an alternative for gunpowder/blazepowder when priming/charging muskets, has 238 durability

 ![Blazing Pouch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6a1b1d33004c31e37ff427c40631249eb72b11c.png)

 ### Bastion Musket Trim
 , right-clicked onto muskets with the bayonet upgrade to apply Pompadour I, increasing base damage by 6 and creating explosions on hit

 ![Bastion Musket Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02029543af8975dc4782a2d35322261252a191e4.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

, there are some extras available for Musketeer

, muskets can be enchanted with Quick Charge to reduce firing delay
 
, muskets can be enchanted with Piercing to deal bonus armor piercing damage

, advancements that are there to guide you through upgrading your musket, aswell as uncovering a hidden mechanic that can reward you with great loot

![Advancements GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4448937e32ed427e13b1e42765df87d0b21a527f.png)

</details>
